subject: Increase vid-mariadb-galera replicaCount from 1 to 2
commit_message:
Increase vid-mariadb-galera replicaCount from 1 to 2

Issue-ID: VID-358

Change-Id: Ic46c9d361e4df9ef218b8cb6ceb314d92810ced0
Signed-off-by: Ittay Stern <ittay.stern@att.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained CI build failure on some jobs.
Jobs with issue:
- Step: apps_deploy 
  * Project: oom 
  * Status: failed 
  * Pipeline: 'https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//pipelines/73657738' 
  * API pipeline url: 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/6550110/pipelines/73657738'

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Please post the test results and I will merge.
Please note that need to move to the common mariadb-galera, ONAP would like the DBs consolidated in this release.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> Please post the test results and I will merge.
> Please note that need to move to the common mariadb-galera, ONAP would like the DBs consolidated in this release.

Thanks, Borislav.
What test result are you seeking for?

I'm not aware of this consolidation commitment for VID (while El-Alto).

Patch Set 1:

> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
 > >
 > > Please post the test results and I will merge.
 > > Please note that need to move to the common mariadb-galera, ONAP
 > would like the DBs consolidated in this release.
 > 
 > Thanks, Borislav.
 > What test result are you seeking for?
 > 
 > I'm not aware of this consolidation commitment for VID (while
 > El-Alto).

Status of VID pods in running state and robot health check of VID.
I am not aware of the commitments of VID, it is an ONAP goal to consolidate DBs.
Patch Set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 2:

Borislav, I've worked with Brian in "design" lab, and verified the cahnge:


root@design-nfs:~/oom/kubernetes/robot# ./ete-k8s.sh onap health-vid
++ export NAMESPACE=onap
++ NAMESPACE=onap
+++ grep robot
+++ sed 's/ .*//'
+++ kubectl --namespace onap get pods
++ POD=dev-robot-robot-8b465896b-nzsjn
++ TAGS='-i health-vid'
++ ETEHOME=/var/opt/ONAP
+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-8b465896b-nzsjn -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'
++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=4
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=4
+++ printf %04d 4
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=0004_ete_health-vid
++ DISPLAY_NUM=94
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:16665'
++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-8b465896b-nzsjn -- /var/opt/ONAP/runTags.sh -V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:16665 -d /share/logs/0004_ete_health-vid -i health-vid --display 94
